Video.summary: Examine the common preconceptions about Celtic identity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Who Are the Celts?

Image.alt: Who Are the Celts?
Who Are the Celts?
Who Are the Celts?

Video.summary: Our earliest written records of the Celts come from Italy, Greece, and Spain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: The Celts and the Classical World

Image.alt: The Celts and the Classical World
The Celts and the Classical World
The Celts and the Classical World

Video.summary: Begin with a look at two iconic spots: the Rock of Cashel and the Guinness Brewery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: A Destination like No Other

Image.alt: A Destination like No Other
A Destination like No Other
A Destination like No Other

Video.summary: Investigate the origins of civilization in Ireland by visiting several ancient sites.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Prehistoric and Celtic Ireland

Image.alt: Prehistoric and Celtic Ireland
Prehistoric and Celtic Ireland
Prehistoric and Celtic Ireland

Video.summary: Archaeological studies of Celtic artifacts have woven a rich tapestry of their millennia-old society.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Art and Artifacts

Image.alt: Celtic Art and Artifacts
Celtic Art and Artifacts
Celtic Art and Artifacts

Video.summary: Discover how Celtic inscriptions on the coast of Spain suggests the development of a common language .
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Languages in the Ancient World

Image.alt: Celtic Languages in the Ancient World
Celtic Languages in the Ancient World
Celtic Languages in the Ancient World

Video.summary: Learn how combat against Celtic-controlled Gaul made certain locations a dangerous neighborhood for Romans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Caesar and the Gauls

Image.alt: Caesar and the Gauls
Caesar and the Gauls
Caesar and the Gauls

Video.summary: Discover the ancient religious figures known as druids who served as holy men, soothsayers, and even lawyers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Religion and the Druids

Image.alt: Celtic Religion and the Druids
Celtic Religion and the Druids
Celtic Religion and the Druids

Video.summary: Use the theory of trade-based migration to explain the arrival of the Celts influence in Britain .
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Britain and Roman Britain

Image.alt: Celtic Britain and Roman Britain
Celtic Britain and Roman Britain
Celtic Britain and Roman Britain

Video.summary: With a Romanized southern Britain, what was life like in Scotland?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celts and Picts in Scotland

Image.alt: Celts and Picts in Scotland
Celts and Picts in Scotland
Celts and Picts in Scotland

Video.summary: Visit important sites related to one of the greatest figures in Irish history: St. Patrick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Early Christian and Medieval Ireland

Image.alt: Early Christian and Medieval Ireland
Early Christian and Medieval Ireland
Early Christian and Medieval Ireland

Video.summary: Explore the British-Irish divide, which is also a Catholic-Protestant divide.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Ireland during the Protestant Ascendancy

Image.alt: Ireland during the Protestant Ascendancy
Ireland during the Protestant Ascendancy
Ireland during the Protestant Ascendancy

Video.summary: Round out your survey of Irish history with an exploration of the 20th century.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: From the Easter Rising to the Present Day

Image.alt: From the Easter Rising to the Present Day
From the Easter Rising to the Present Day
From the Easter Rising to the Present Day

Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Dublin's Fair City

Image.alt: Dublin's Fair City
Dublin's Fair City
Dublin's Fair City

Video.summary: Trace Irish history from the ancient Celts to the Middle Ages.

Video.title: Roots of Irish Identity: Celts to Monks

Image.alt: Roots of Irish Identity: Celts to Monks
Roots of Irish Identity: Celts to Monks
Roots of Irish Identity: Celts to Monks

Video.summary: Go back to the 1100s, when Ireland lacked a king, and witness the Norman invasions.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Irish Identity: Independence, History, and Literature
Video.title: Gaelic Ireland's Fall: Vikings to Cromwell

Image.alt: Gaelic Ireland's Fall: Vikings to Cromwell
Gaelic Ireland's Fall: Vikings to Cromwell
Gaelic Ireland's Fall: Vikings to Cromwell

Video.summary: Examine the rise of William of Orange, who restored Protestantism to England.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Irish Identity: Independence, History, and Literature
Video.title: The Penal Laws and Protestant Ascendancy

Image.alt: The Penal Laws and Protestant Ascendancy
The Penal Laws and Protestant Ascendancy

Video.summary: Follow Irish history through the age of rebellions sweeping across Europe and America.

Image.alt: Ireland at the Turn of the 19th Century
Ireland at the Turn of the 19th Century

Video.summary: Meet Daniel O'Connell, a 19th-century politician and activist who led the charge for Catholic emancipation

Video.title: Daniel O'Connell and the Great Famine

Image.alt: Daniel O'Connell and the Great Famine
Daniel O'Connell and the Great Famine

Video.summary: Explore how 19th-century political tensions set the stage for a renewed interest in ancient Irish culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Irish Identity: Independence, History, and Literature
Video.title: The Celtic Revival

Image.alt: The Celtic Revival
The Celtic Revival
The Celtic Revival

Video.summary: Learn the Irish playwrights conundrum: write in Irish and remain obscure or find success by adopting English.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Irish Identity: Independence, History, and Literature
Video.title: Shaw and Wilde: Irish Wit, London Stage

Image.alt: Shaw and Wilde: Irish Wit, London Stage
Shaw and Wilde: Irish Wit, London Stage

Video.summary: Discover the quest of W. B. Yeats for meaning in the two worlds of the Irish countryside and the English city.

Image.alt: W. B. Yeats and the Irish Renaissance

Video.summary: Start your adventures in the world of beer with a step-by-step look at the best way to taste beer.

Image.alt: Beer Tasting: From Helles to Lambics
Beer Tasting: From Helles to Lambics

Video.summary: Dive into ancient history and archaeology as seen through the lens of beer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale

Image.alt: Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale
Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale

Video.summary: Plunge into the fascinating science of yeast and the microbiology that drives brewing.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons

Image.alt: Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons
Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons

Video.summary: Beer is a thoroughly agricultural product which emerged as humans began to congregate in urban civilizations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs

Image.alt: Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs
Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs

Video.summary: Explore how some beer styles powerfully evoke a sense of place with every sip.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture

Image.alt: Beer Geography: Terroir, Caves, and Guinness

Video.summary: Learn about the critical roles religion and ritual have played in shaping our beer tastes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture

Image.alt: Beer and Religion: Monks, Bocks, and Trappists

Video.summary: Here, investigate some ancient and modern legends surrounding beer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Legends: Myths, Witches, and Vikings

Image.alt: Beer Legends: Myths, Witches, and Vikings
Beer Legends: Myths, Witches, and Vikings

Video.summary: Poke your head inside taverns, pubs, inns, and other places where beer has brought people together for thousands of years.
